reviews.comment:
Siempre fue un lugar de muy buena atención. Hoy, 19.de julio de 2021, a las 20;30 llegamos y nos dijeron que la cocina estaba cerrada porque estaban arreglando el techo, pero afuera había un cartel que anunciaba una promo de hamburguesas con papas. Las 3 empleadas estaban viendo la televisión muy frescamente. Tengo la foto x si les interesa.

(Translated by Google)
It was always a place with great service. Today, July 19, 2021, at 8:30 PM, we arrived and were told the kitchen was closed because they were repairing the roof, but outside there was a sign advertising a burger and fries special. The three employees were watching TV, completely relaxed. I have a picture if you're interested.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURxM19fSVlBEAE
